allow: PowerShell($drive = Test-Path "G:\\My Drive\\__LO-DataV2"; $lock = Test-Path "G:\\My Drive\\__LO-DataV2\\.headless.lock"; $node = @\(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); Write-Output "Drive mounted: $drive"; Write-Output "Lock file present: $lock"; Write-Output "Node processes: $\($node.Count\)"; if \($node.Count -gt 0\) { $node | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{N='CPU\(s\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String })

PowerShell($db = "C:\\Users\\farzi.JAZZ\\Documents\\.lifeos\\lifeos.db"; if \(Test-Path $db\) { Get-Item $db | Select-Object FullName, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-List | Out-String } else { "DB not found at $db" })

PowerShell($env_file = "c:\\Users\\farzi.JAZZ\\Documents\\Projects\\__LifeOS\\.env"; if \(Test-Path $env_file\) { $lines = Get-Content $env_file; $hasKey = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=' }; if \($hasKey\) { $val = \($hasKey -split '=',2\)[1].Trim\(\); Write-Output "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY present, length=$\($val.Length\), prefix=$\($val.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(8,$val.Length\)\)\)" } else { "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing in .env" }; $dataPath = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^DATA_FOLDER_PATH=' }; Write-Output "DATA_FOLDER_PATH line: $dataPath"; $dbPath = $lines | Where-Object { $_ -match '^DB_PATH=' }; Write-Output "DB_PATH line: $dbPath" } else { ".env not found" })
